title: foeniculum piperitum subsp. divaricatum
intro: Foeniculum piperitum subsp. divaricatum, also known as Divaricate Fennel, is a subspecies of Fennel (Foeniculum vulgare), a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate digestive issues and reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Foeniculum piperitum subsp. divaricatum include its potential to improve digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
